state.next-action: Expose manifest import/export controls in Space Explorer and bind canonical-only filtering to report-driven model/asset selectors across all views.

agent-id-policy.rule: Each agent must generate a unique id and register it in STATE.xml before claiming tasks.

human-input.cadence: When PRD/GRD scope changes or new product direction appears.
human-input.missing-docs: Record gaps in PRD/GRD in DECISIONS.xml.

concurrency.notes: Parallel phases should declare dependencies in ROADMAP.xml and tasks in TASK-REGISTRY.xml.
